title: Cybersecurity Solutions Lead (CrowdStrike Specialist)
description:
🔹 Job Title: Cybersecurity Solutions Lead (CrowdStrike Specialist)

📍 Location: Singapore (Covers ASEAN region)
🕒 Full-Time | Regional Scope

About the Role:

We are looking for a cybersecurity leader with hands-on experience in CrowdStrike solutions to drive technical strategy, partner enablement, and pre-sales activities across ASEAN. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys combining technical expertise, team leadership, and business alignment in a fast-evolving security landscape.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead the regional technical pre-sales and solutions team with a focus on endpoint protection and threat intelligence
  • Serve as the technical authority for CrowdStrike, delivering training, demos, PoCs, and architecture consultations
  • Work closely with partners and internal sales teams to craft winning cybersecurity solutions
  • Design and maintain service offerings, including SOPs and scope documentation for service delivery
  • Drive partner technical enablement and build scalable frameworks for onboarding and certification
  • Provide executive briefings and technical workshops to clients and channel partners
  • Act as the lead technical resource for Singapore, with room to scale and build the team
  • Align with vendor (CrowdStrike) roadmaps and regional GTM initiatives

Key Requirements:

  • At least 10 years of technical experience, including 5+ years in cybersecurity
  • Proven hands-on experience with CrowdStrike solutions (certifications are a plus)
  • Strong pre-sales and partner enablement background
  • Familiarity with endpoint, EDR, cloud, and network security architecture
  • Experience leading regional teams and interfacing with senior stakeholders
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and relationship-building skills
  • Willingness to travel across ASEAN as part of regional coverage

This is a great opportunity for a CrowdStrike-focused cybersecurity leader who wants to shape regional impact, lead technical strategy, and grow a team over time.


Wecruit Pte Ltd

Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
